runningdinner-backend/infrastructure/dep.general_idea: Update the Docker base image from OpenJDK 8 to Amazon Corretto 17 to align with the Java 17 migration.
runningdinner-backend/infrastructure/dep.why_exists: The application code has been migrated to Java 17, so running it on a Java 8 base image would result in runtime errors due to missing language features and API changes.

runningdinner-backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler source and target version property from 11 to 17 to align with the Java 17 migration.
runningdinner-backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would compile against Java 11 language features, potentially missing Java 17 specific features or failing if the build environment enforces strict version alignment with the runtime JDK 17.
